title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to talk with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’) supporting multi-user, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem that wraps Ollama’s REST API for easy LLM integration in Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-written Go CLI that adds model search, bulk pull, and YAML config to stock ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Neovim plugin that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling options.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile collection for CodeLlama, Zephyr, SQLCoder, etc., ready to import.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Socket-Mode to expose Ollama chat in channels/DMs.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed requests and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for offline LLM tests.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation stack using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single docker-compose.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Streamlit-based desktop GUI to chat with Ollama models and compare outputs side-by-side.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you summarize notes, brainstorm, and Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai community enabling Ollama models as generators and embedders.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repo tracking all official and community SDKs (Go, Rust, Swift, Dart, etc.) for Ollama.
